2604.01179.title: A ROS 2 Wrapper for Florence-2: Multi-Mode Local Vision-Language Inference for Robotic Systems
2604.01179.paper_summary: Foundation vision-language models are becoming increasingly relevant to robotics because they can provide richer semantic perception than narrow task-specific pipelines. However, their practical adoption in robot software stacks still depends on reproducible middleware integrations rather than on model quality alone. Florence-2 is especially attractive in this regard because it unifies captioning, optical character recognition, open-vocabulary detection, grounding and related vision-language tasks within a comparatively manageable model size. This article presents a ROS 2 wrapper for Florence-2 that exposes the model through three complementary interaction modes: continuous topic-driven processing, synchronous service calls and asynchronous actions. The wrapper is designed for local execution and supports both native installation and Docker container deployment. It also combines generic JSON outputs with standard ROS 2 message bindings for detection-oriented tasks. A functional validation is reported together with a throughput study on several GPUs, showing that local deployment is feasible with consumer grade hardware. The repository is publicly available here: https://github.com/JEDominguezVidal/florence2_ros2_wrapper
2604.01179.paper_summary_zh: 基礎的視覺-語言模型在機器人技術中變得越來越重要，因為它們能提供比狹窄的特定任務管道更豐富的語義感知。<lb/>然而，它們在機器人軟體堆疊中的實際採用仍然依賴於可重複的中介整合，而不僅僅是模型質量。<lb/>在這方面，Florence-2 特別具有吸引力，因為它將字幕生成、光學字符識別、開放詞彙檢測、基礎定位以及相關的視覺-語言任務統一在一個相對可管理的模型大小內。<lb/>本文介紹了一個針對 Florence-2 的 ROS 2 包裝器，通過三種互補的互動模式來暴露該模型：持續的主題驅動處理、同步服務調用和異步行動。<lb/>該包裝器設計用於本地執行，並支持本地安裝和 Docker 容器部署。<lb/>它還將通用的 JSON 輸出與標準 ROS 2 消息綁定結合，用於檢測導向的任務。<lb/>報告了一項功能驗證以及在幾個 GPU 上的吞吐量研究，顯示本地部署在消費級硬體上是可行的。<lb/>該資料庫可在此公開獲得：https://github.com/JEDominguezVidal/florence2_ros2_wrapper
2604.01179.author: J. E. Domínguez-Vidal et.al.
